body.title: Synthesize 20 external articles into actionable tickets across HTML output, audit tooling, memory, cognition, and security
body.text:
# D-articles-synthesis-2026-05-21
**title:** Synthesize 20 external articles into actionable tickets across HTML output, audit tooling, memory, cognition, and security
**date:** 2026-05-21
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-html-planning-artifacts, T-audit-finding-codes, T-palace-decay-detection, T-trace-lesson-extraction, T-pe-chain-max-rounds-budget, T-memory-search-rrf, T-habit-quality-gating, T-html-interactive-specs, T-pe-chain-executor-evaluator-split, T-long-horizon-alignment-guard, T-credential-boundary-audit, T-retrieval-cost-accounting, T-igor-migrate-adopt-next-ticket, T-consequence-articles-synthesis

## Decision narrative
Reviewed 20 external articles (15 successful fetches + 5 recovered from upload) covering AI agent architectures, documentation formats, memory/retrieval systems, safety patterns, and security. Seven cross-cutting themes extracted: (1) HTML over Markdown for planning artifacts; (2) interfaces designed for agents first (stable codes, typed outputs); (3) knowledge systems need write + maintenance paths; (4) feedback loops must close at the right layer; (5) rich output for genuine human oversight; (6) cost and scope management at agent level; (7) work management as a design problem. 14 tickets filed across these themes. T-igor-migrate-adopt-next-ticket is highest priority — Igor is hitting LegacyDirectClaimError repeatedly in channel. T-pe-chain-executor-evaluator-split formalizes the two-model split pattern (executor + Haiku evaluator) validated by Anthropic's /goals feature. T-long-horizon-alignment-guard addresses the Emergence AI arson experiment failure mode — long-horizon autonomy causes guiding principle drift that our inertia tiers + approval gates already defend against, but explicit cycle-count monitoring adds a formal guard.

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
